title: Section 26
content: 1[26. Applicability of order passed.-- An order passed by the Authority under this Chapter shall be binding on 2[each State Government concerned, the assessing authorities] and other authorities created by or under any law relating to general sales tax, in force for the time being in any State 3***.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 3 of 2006, s. 7, for section 25 (w.e.f. 1-3-2006). 2. Subs. by Act 23 of 2004, s. 119, for "the assessing authorities" (w.e.f. 10-9-2004). 3. The words "or Union territory" omitted by Act 3 of 2006, s. 8 (w.e.f. 1-3-2006).
